description: Give dam-specific combinations first refusal in USE routing and replace the terse dam MELZAR response with a complete physical diagnostic

replacements.old:
(<EQUAL? ,HERE ,DAM-ROOM>
	       <TELL "A cold voice reports: CONTROL SYSTEM ">
	       <COND (,GATES-OPEN <TELL "ACTIVE; SLUICE GATES OPEN">)
	             (T <TELL "INACTIVE OR INCOMPLETE; INSPECT CONTROLS AND TURNING HARDWARE">)>
	       <TELL "." CR>)
